name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — how did we do?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thank you for trusting us with your smile. We hope your visit felt calm, comfortable, and maybe even a little less scary than you expected — that's always our goal.

If you have 30 seconds, we'd be so grateful if you shared a quick review. Honest feedback helps other nervous patients find a dental team they can feel safe with:

https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if something didn't feel quite right, please just hit reply — we'd much rather hear from you directly and make it better.

With care,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick nudge! If your visit felt good, a short review really helps other nervous patients find us: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
